completed_tasks.title: Inicializar projeto Next.js 14 com TypeScript strict, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
Criar schema PostgreSQL completo
completed_tasks.notes: All models created. Schema moved to supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql

completed_tasks.title: Arquitetura: Remover Prisma, usar Supabase Edge Functions
Criar schema PostgreSQL via Supabase SQL Editor
completed_tasks.notes: SQL DDL now in supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql. RLS policies in 002_rls_policies.sql.

completed_tasks.title: Implementar ingest-cocktaildb.ts — itera todos os drinks do CocktailDB
completed_tasks.notes: Ingested 425 unique drinks from CocktailDB API. Output: scripts/data/raw/cocktails.json.

completed_tasks.title: Implementar upload-images-r2.ts — baixa thumb, converte para WebP, faz upload R2
completed_tasks.notes: Downloaded 425 thumbnails from CocktailDB. Cache: scripts/data/images/. Image map: scripts/data/raw/image-map.json. Mock R2 upload ready.

completed_tasks.title: Implementar seed-db.ts — insere drinks no Postgres
completed_tasks.notes: Seed script ready: 18 categories, 60 ingredients, 425 cocktails, 1668 relationships. Awaits T-013 for PT/ES enrichment.

completed_tasks.title: Implementar enrich-with-ai.ts — gera PT/EN/ES descriptions via Claude Haiku em batch
completed_tasks.notes: Batches API pipeline ready. scripts/enrich-with-ai.js + collect-enrichment.js. Demo mode for non-valid API keys. 425 drinks in 9 batches of 50 (~$3 cost). Updated seed-db.js to auto-detect enriched data.

completed_tasks.title: Implementar generate-embeddings.ts — cria embeddings 384-dim via Xenova para RAG
completed_tasks.notes: Embeddings pipeline complete. generate-embeddings.js/ts creates 384-dim vectors for all 425 cocktails using Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2. PostgreSQL migration (003) adds pgvector + HNSW index. Edge Functions: embeddings-upsert (batch upload) + semantic-search (RAG queries). Output: cocktails-embedded.json.

completed_tasks.title: Criar src/lib/seo/metadata.ts com helpers tipados
completed_tasks.notes: SEO helpers library complete. src/lib/seo/metadata.ts (generateSEOMetadata, OpenGraph, Twitter), src/lib/seo/jsonld.ts (Recipe, BreadcrumbList, Organization, Article schemas), src/lib/seo/images.ts (responsive images, CDN, srcset), src/lib/seo/types.ts (common types, limits). All strict TypeScript, ready for SSG pages.

completed_tasks.title: Criar página SSG /drinks/[slug] com Schema.org + OG image dinâmica
completed_tasks.notes: SSG drink detail page complete. app/drinks/[slug]/page.tsx with generateStaticParams, generateMetadata, Recipe + Breadcrumb JSON-LD schemas. Dynamic OG image via app/api/og/[slug]/route.tsx using @vercel/og. REST API queries for build-time slug fetching. TypeScript strict, builds successfully.

session_log.notes: T-013 complete. Anthropic Batches API pipeline for enrichment. Ready for production use with valid ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
T-014 complete. Embeddings generation (Xenova) + pgvector storage + Edge Functions for RAG. 425 cocktails embedded in 384 dims.
T-020 complete. SEO metadata helpers library with strict TypeScript. Includes generateSEOMetadata, JSON-LD schemas, image optimization, and common types.

T-021 complete. SSG drink detail page with Schema.org + dynamic OG image. app/drinks/[slug]/page.tsx uses REST API for build-time slug fetching. Dynamic OG image at /api/og/[slug]. Full TypeScript support, builds successfully with npm run build.

status: T-021 complete. SSG drink detail pages ready. Next: T-022 (category/ingredient pages).
